Learn more Passengers requiring special services (unattended children, infirm passengers, and passengers with mobility issues) may benefit from in person check-in methods rather thanonlinecheck-in.", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "Total Addressable Market (TAM) | Formula + Calculator", "url": "https://www.wallstreetprep.com/knowledge/total-addressable-market-tam/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] What is TAM? TheTotalAddressableMarket(TAM) is the estimatedmarketdemand for a certain product or service, which can be used to size the implied revenue opportunity attributable to a particular company. Conceptually, the TAM is an estimate of thetotaldemand that exists in themarketfor a particular product or service, which can be used to determine the maximum revenue opportunity.", "relevance_score": 0.6}, {"title": "PDFMarket Size 1.9 BILLION* TRIPS BOOKED (WORLDWIDE) Total Addressable ...", "url": "https://edit.org/editor/user_downloads/2024/09/16/b/8/b8dbe8175ae90435cc71209672213498.pdf", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] MarketSize 1.9 BILLION*TRIPSBOOKED (WORLDWIDE)TotalAddressableMarket(TAM) 10.6MTRIPSWITH OUR COMPANYServiceableObtainableMarket(SOM) Pitch Deck Template532MBUDGET&ONLINETRIPSServiceableAvailableMarket(SAM)", "relevance_score": 0.95}, {"title": "Offa's Dyke Central Section Guided Holiday | Ramble", "url": "https://www.rambleworldwide.co.uk/united-kingdom/wales/offa-s-dyke-central-section", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content]     *   [Winter Activities](https://www.rambleworldwide.co.uk/best-for/winter-activities)     *   [Worldwide Journeys](https://www.rambleworldwide.co.uk/best-for/worldwide-journeys) [See all categories](https://www.rambleworldwide.co.uk/best-for) Select the walking holiday that's right for you With more than 300 tours, we've categorised our walking holidays by what they're Best For..
